flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Goshen College rose 18% between 2017 and 2020 ($19.5k → $23.0k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Goshen College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.3% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Goshen College rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 (70.2% → 80.1%).
